Drop any file here to verify

Audio · Image · Video — anything that carries C2PA Content Credentials.

Or run with nothing and this stays put. Private — files never leave your machine.

Claims

Signed outputs from rAIdio.bot and Doomscroll.fm verify here out of the box — try example: rAIdio.bot or example: Doomscroll.fm.
